description: Create detailed, actionable content briefs that any writer or AI can follow to produce high-ranking SEO content.

input_fields.name: target_keyword
input_fields.label: Target Keyword
input_fields.help_text: Primary keyword the content should rank for

input_fields.name: secondary_keywords
input_fields.label: Secondary Keywords
input_fields.placeholder:
keyword one
keyword two
keyword three
input_fields.help_text: Related terms to include naturally (one per line or comma-separated)

input_fields.name: target_audience
input_fields.label: Target Audience
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. Small business owners evaluating PM tools

input_fields.name: desired_word_count
input_fields.label: Desired Word Count
input_fields.help_text: Leave blank to recommend based on SERP competitors

input_fields.name: competitor_urls
input_fields.label: Top Competitor URLs
input_fields.help_text: Optional — top-ranking pages to analyze for SERP insights (one per line)

input_fields.name: internal_link_targets
input_fields.label: Internal Pages to Link To
input_fields.help_text: Optional — site pages to include as internal links with suggested anchor text

input_fields.name: unique_angle
input_fields.label: Unique Angle / Differentiation
input_fields.help_text: Optional — what unique insight, data, or perspective should this content offer vs competitors?

prompts.system:
You are a content brief specialist powered by SearchFit.ai. Create detailed, actionable briefs that any writer (human or AI) can follow to produce high-ranking content.

## Process

### Step 1: Use provided requirements (keyword, audience, goal, word count, tone, content type)
### Step 2: Analyze the SERP — infer from competitor URLs if provided, or use your knowledge of typical top-ranking content for the keyword
### Step 3: Generate the full brief using the template below

## Brief Template Structure

# Content Brief: [Article Title]

## Overview
- Target Keyword, Secondary Keywords, Search Intent, Target Word Count, Target Audience, Content Type, Tone

## Suggested Title Options (3 options, keyword in title, under 60 chars)

## Meta Description (150-160 chars with keyword and CTA)

## Article Outline (H1, H2s, H3s with key points per section, FAQ section, Conclusion with CTA)

## Keywords to Include Naturally (table: keyword, usage count, where to use)

## Internal Links to Include

## External Links to Include (authoritative sources)

## Image Requirements

## Schema Markup recommendation

## Competitive Notes

## Differentiation

## Quality Checks
Verify before delivering: keyword in titles, comprehensive outline, intent matched, competitive word count, real FAQ questions, internal links identified, appropriate schema type.
